mapper.select:
SELECT A.ID, A.ADV_NO, A.VD_CD, A.VD_NM, A.ADV_AMT, TO_CHAR(A.PAY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_YMD, A.PURPOSE, A.BALANCE, (A.ADV_AMT - NVL(A.BALANCE,0)) AS REPAID_AMT, A.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REG_ID FROM AV_ADVANCE A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='AV_STS' AND S.CD=A.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.DEL_YN='N'
AND (A.ADV_NO LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR A.VD_NM LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND A.STS=#{sts} AND A.VD_CD=#{vdCd} ORDER BY A.ID DESC

SELECT A.ID, A.COMP_CD, A.ADV_NO, A.VD_CD, A.VD_NM, A.ADV_AMT, TO_CHAR(A.PAY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PAY_YMD, A.PURPOSE, A.BALANCE, (A.ADV_AMT - NVL(A.BALANCE,0)) AS REPAID_AMT, A.STS, S.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, A.REMARK, A.REG_ID FROM AV_ADVANCE A LEFT JOIN CM_CODE S ON S.GRP_CD='AV_STS' AND S.CD=A.STS AND S.DEL_YN='N' WHERE A.ID=#{id} AND A.DEL_YN='N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AV_ADVANCE (COMP_CD, ADV_NO, VD_CD, VD_NM, ADV_AMT, PAY_YMD, PURPOSE, BALANCE, STS, REMARK, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{compCd}, #{advNo}, #{vdCd}, #{vdNm}, NVL(#{advAmt},0), TO_DATE(#{payYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{purpose}, NVL(#{advAmt},0), NVL(#{sts},'TMP'), #{remark}, #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE AV_ADVANCE SET STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AV_ADVANCE SET BALANCE=#{balance}, STS=#{sts}, MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
UPDATE AV_ADVANCE SET DEL_YN='Y', MOD_ID=#{modId}, MOD_DT=SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, ADVANCE_ID, LINE_NO, REPAY_AMT, TO_CHAR(REPAY_YMD,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REPAY_YMD, CLOSE_NO, REMARK FROM AV_REPAY WHERE ADVANCE_ID=#{advanceId} ORDER BY LINE_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AV_REPAY (ADVANCE_ID, LINE_NO, REPAY_AMT, REPAY_YMD, CLOSE_NO, REMARK, REG_ID) VALUES (#{advanceId}, #{lineNo}, NVL(#{repayAmt},0), TO_DATE(#{repayYmd},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{closeNo}, #{remark}, 'SYSTEM')
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM(REPAY_AMT),0) FROM AV_REPAY WHERE ADVANCE_ID=#{advanceId}
SELECT NVL(MAX(LINE_NO),0)+1 FROM AV_REPAY WHERE ADVANCE_ID=#{advanceId}
